---    
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 2.5cm
      y: 2.5cm
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          #import "templates.typ": *
          #set page( 
            footer: context [
              #set text(8pt, fill: luma(120))
              #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + luma(150))
              #grid(
                columns: (1fr, 1fr),
                align(left)[Confidential / Vertrouwelijk],
                align(right)[Page #counter(page).display() / #counter(page).final().at(0)]
              )
            ]
          )
          #set table(stroke: 0.5pt + rgb("#bdc3c7"))
params:
  sending_id: "4587"
  lang: null
  id_report: "HOSP_001"
  banner_path: "SPF_BI-LANGUE.jpg"
---

```{=typst}
/*
#pagebreak()

#set page(
  width: 29.7cm,
  height: 21cm
)*/
```
```{python}
#| label: init-modules
#| echo: false

from db_manager import ReportDataManager
import pdf_components as comp



import os

lang_param = os.getenv("QUARTO_PARAM_lang", os.getenv("QUARTO_PARAM_LANG", "fr"))
id_report_param = os.getenv("QUARTO_PARAM_id_report", os.getenv("QUARTO_PARAM_ID_REPORT", "HOSP_001"))

print("LANG =", lang_param)

db = ReportDataManager(lang=lang_param, id_report=id_report_param)


```

![](SPF_BI-LANGUE.jpg){width="50%" fig-align="left"}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
titre = db.get_txt("titre_section_1")
print("```{=typst}")
print("#align(center)[")
print(f"  == {titre}")
print("]")
print("#v(10pt)")
print("#align(center)[#line(length: 40%, stroke: 1pt + luma(180))]")
print("#v(15pt)")

print("```")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

df_hosp = db.get_hospital_data()
table_md = comp.generate_hospital_table(df_hosp, db)

print("```{=typst}")
print("#align(center)[")
print(table_md)
print("]")
print("```")

```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
titre = db.get_txt("titre_section_2")
print("```{=typst}")
print("#align(center)[")
print(f"  == {titre}")
print("]")
print("#v(15pt)")
print("```")
```

```{python}
#| label: tableau-erreurs
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| output: true
df_err = db.get_errors_data()
# On force l'affichage de l'objet Great Tables pour Quarto Typst
comp.generate_severity_errors_table(df_err, db)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

txt = f"""
{db.get_txt("sev1_title")}
{db.get_txt("sev1_desc")}

{db.get_txt("sev2_title")}
{db.get_txt("sev2_desc")}

{db.get_txt("sev3_title")}
{db.get_txt("sev3_desc")}
"""

print("```{=typst}")

print("#v(25pt)")
print("#par(justify: true)[")
print(txt)
print("]")
print("```")

```

```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
```
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
titre = db.get_txt("titre_section_2")
print("```{=typst}")
print("#align(center)[")
print(f"  == {titre}")
print("]")
print("#v(15pt)")
print("```")
```

```{python}
#| label: tableau-erreurs2
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

df_err = db.get_errors_data()
table_err = comp.generate_severity_errors_table_typst(df_err, db)

print("```{=typst}")
print(table_err)
print("```")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

txt = f"""
{db.get_txt("sev1_title")}
{db.get_txt("sev1_desc")}

{db.get_txt("sev2_title")}
{db.get_txt("sev2_desc")}

{db.get_txt("sev3_title")}
{db.get_txt("sev3_desc")}
"""

print("```{=typst}")

print("#v(25pt)")
print("#par(justify: true)[")
print(txt)
print("]")
print("```")

```

```{=typst}
#page_landscape()


#title_block("TEST_SECTION 0")

```


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

titre = db.get_txt("titre_section_1")

print("```{=typst}")
print(f"#title_block({repr(titre)})")
print("```")

```
```{python}

#| echo: false
#| output: asis   
titre= db.get_txt("titre_section_1")
print("```{=typst}")
print(f"#section_landscape([{f'#title_block({repr(titre)})'}])")
print("```")

df_hosp = db.get_hospital_data()
table_md = comp.generate_hospital_table(df_hosp, db)

print("```{=typst}")
print("#align(center)[")
print(table_md)
print("]")
print("```")

```
